summary: Classified the 10 hydrated seed PRs independently for a live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive item was detected, and no close/merge/fix action is planned because this job disables low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths.

actions.reason: Useful active PR with unresolved proof/check/review gates; no safe close or merge action is available in this inventory job.
Focused bug-fix PR with active review/check gates and possible duplicate implementation context; keep open outside this inventory shard.
Plausible focused bug fix with active re-review/proof requirements; keep open for the normal review lane.
Active feature PR with check failures and failed review automation; no close action is safe and merge/fix are disabled.
Useful focused bug-fix PR with active author/re-review signal; keep open for maintainer review.
Large active focused PR with failed review automation and failing checks; no merge, fix, or close path is available in this job.
Focused P1 bug-fix PR with maintainer signal and unresolved review/update questions; keep open for the normal repair/review path.
Useful focused bug-fix PR with incomplete review and a failing check; keep open.
Plausible focused provider bug fix with pending review automation; keep open for maintainer review.
Focused feature PR with incomplete review proof; keep open.
